problem id: d9bdf754
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00000011 -> 01111001
  00101100 -> 10100111
  00101111 -> 00100011
  11010011 -> 11011101
  01000110 -> 01110111
  01001101 -> 11100101
  11111110 -> 00001111
  01001100 -> 01100111

query: 01110000
predicted answer: 00011111
